title: Avoid Duplicating Class Name in Fields
description: It's confusing to have a class member with the same name (case differences aside) as its enclosing class. This rule helps to enforce best practices by requiring any field or member with the same name as the enclosing class to be renamed to be more descriptive.
recommendation: Rename the field to be more descriptive of the particular aspect of the class it represents or holds.
impact: Improves code readability and reduces potential confusion.

checks.message: Rule: Avoid Duplicating Class Name in Fields
